subcodes.first_line: O Hands of the Cause of God! Your recent letter hath been received, and its contents have become known and clear. In truth, those pages [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ایادی امرالله مکتوب اخیر واصل و مضامین معلوم و واضح شد فی الحقیقه آنصفحات
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @exhortations and counsels, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
